type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: In 2019, fuel usage in diesel generators was estimated by using generator run times. In previous years, generator fuel usage was estimated using fuel deliveries.  We believe generator run times will provide a more accurate estimate of fuel usage.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous year (2016) included commissioning of 2 new large generators where tanks needed to be filled for first time and this overestimated emissions in 2016.  The 2017 amounts are more reflective of actual fuel used in those generators.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: In the development of a new runway at the airport, a house had to be demolished.  Within the stucco, aesbestos was found.  This is the only source of asbestos for this reporting period.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Aesbestos was found when demolishing a local farm house for the development of the airfield.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: No asbestos was released into the environment.  Asbestos was disposed of off-site.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: New procedures in place, as implemented by a new contractor revealed minor releases in previous years (minor release).  Accumulative total of previous years releases reported in 2008.  New PM program in place will detect minor leaks.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: New procedures in place, as implemented by a new contractor revealed minor releases in previous years (minor release).  Accumulative total of previous years releases reported in 2008.  New PM program in place will detect minor leaks.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: A small number of leaks had occurred over a few years past but were never reported.  A new contractor has been hired to manage boilers and chillers on behalf of the Calgary Airport Authority.  The new manager identified previous releases that were not rep

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Low NOx boiler not functioning in 2007.  Fewer fire training exercises (open burn).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Concrete batch plant on site in 2007.  Fewer fire training exercises (open burn). Low NOx boiler not in use (repairs).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increases in PM10 from historic levels were recorded due to larger than historical fire fighting certification requirements (fire staff turnover required newly certified fire fighting exercises as opposed to recertification, which requires less training)

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The airport fire department has switched to B20 Biodiesel for fire training which accounts for the decrease in  non point emissions since 2005. There were no significant changes for point emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: As there was not the same amount of construction occuring as there was last year, accounting for the significant decrease in fugitive releases. The construction that was going on though, is accountable for the increase in point releases. The reduction of

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in facility size from previous year accounts for the increase in point source releases. A reduction in the amount of fuel used for fire training accounts for the reduction in non-point emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in the construction at the facility accounts for the increase in point source and fugitive releases. The reduction of fuel used for fire training accounts for the reduction of non-point source releases.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Less fuel used in fire training practice.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Less fuel used for fire training  No concrete crushing/recycling operations

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The change in the CO reporting from last year was attributed to a reduction in the amount of fuel used in fire training exercises.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Construction activities in 2002 did not require decomissioning of components containing mercury.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Mercury was removed  as part of air terminal building modification.
The product was recycled under the Alberta Waste Control Regulation and federal Export/Import of Hazardous Waste Regulations

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Changes are due to the reduction in fuel used in fire training exercises.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Majority of CO released is a result from fire mockup training activities which is required for maintaining certification as CAT 9 airport and for aviation safety.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Majority of PM10 release due to fire training mock up facility.  This activity is necessary to maintain certification as CAT 9 airport for the purposes of aviation safety.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The majority of the facilities Nitrogen Oxide emissions are created from natural gas boilers and heaters.  Usage can fluctuate from year-to-year depending on weather and usage.  Due to the COVID-19 global pandemic, parts of the terminal building were closed to the public which resulted in a decreased requirement for natural gas heating.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The majority of the facilities carbon monoxide emissions are created from natural gas boilers and heaters.  Usage can fluctuate from year-to-year depending on weather and usage.  Due to the COVID-19 global pandemic, parts of the terminal building were closed to the public which resulted in a decreased requirement for natural gas heating.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The majority of the facilities sulphur dioxide emissions are created from back up generators.  In previous years, fuel delivery amounts were used to estimate emissions from generators.  In 2020, and going forward, the Calgary Airport Authority will be using generator run times to more accurately calculate emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

In 2020, and going forward, the Calgary Airport Authority will be using generator run times to more accurately calculate emissions.
